faqs.question: How do I know if I have a clothes moth infestation in my Clifton home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include small irregular holes in wool, silk, or cashmere garments, webbing in closet corners, visible adult moths flying around closets or windows, and the presence of small cream-colored larvae or cocoons on clothing. You may also notice damage to upholstered furniture, carpets, or stored blankets. Our Clifton technicians can perform a thorough inspection to confirm the extent of your infestation.

Minor infestations in a single closet cost less, while whole-home treatments involving multiple rooms, extensive fabric treatments, and follow-up visits will be at the higher end of the range.
